overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Grand Theft Auto: Vice City showing the protagonist Tommy Vercetti walking along Ocean Beach at night. The character transitions from a paved promenade with a stone retaining wall to a wooden boardwalk lined with palm trees, with the beach and dark cloudy sky visible throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved beachfront promenade with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the paved promenade toward the beach, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in purple jacket and pink shorts walking past the camera
two men standing and conversing near the stone wall

entered.detail: low stone wall separating the promenade from the beach sand
concrete walkway surface along the beachfront
sandy beach area visible beyond the retaining wall
yellow beach umbrellas scattered on the distant sand

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved beachfront promenade at night, with a stone retaining wall on the left separating the walkway from the sandy beach beyond. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a woman in purple who passes close by. The sky is dark with dramatic clouds as the character approaches two men conversing near the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk along beach with palm tree landscaping

events.description: transition from paved promenade to wooden boardwalk as the stone wall ends

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wooden boardwalk passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the boardwalk

entered.detail: planked wooden walkway surface replacing the concrete
tropical palm trees lining the grassy area beside the walkway
well-maintained grass strip between the boardwalk and buildings
tall white art deco style building visible behind the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wooden boardwalk as the stone wall ends, with the beach now directly adjacent on the right. Palm trees and a grassy lawn line the left side, with a tall white art deco hotel building visible in the background. The character continues walking along the boardwalk, passing other pedestrians enjoying the evening beach atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime beachfront that transitions from a paved promenade into a wooden boardwalk. It begins with the character walking past a stone retaining wall under a dark, cloudy sky, passing sparse pedestrians including a woman in purple. As the character approaches two men conversing by the wall, the paved walkway gives way to a wooden boardwalk. The scene then opens up as the stone barrier ends, shifting the beach to the right side while palm trees and a grassy lawn emerge on the left. Finally, the camera continues forward past other evening strollers, revealing a tall white art deco hotel building looming in the background.
